content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates consistent, specific, and timely reads throughout. Turn 2 catches the laugh as a signal ('what's in it?') — a classic somatic/affective read at the moment it happens. Turn 4 names the deflective move embedded in 'if I don't laugh I'll be depressed' and uses it as a portal. Turn 6 reflects back the weight she just minimized ('That's not the obvious part. That's a lot.') — reading the rush-past-the-grief signature. Turn 8 catches the 'sorry I went somewhere else' as the actual center, refusing to let her dismiss her own material. Turns 12 and 14 track linguistic micro-moments — the self-interruption ('I kind of lost track of —') and the cost language — naming what she shown but didn't say. Reads consistently precede questions; they are specific (laugh, self-stopping, the said-vs-shown), not generic. The coach reads defensiveness-as-identity-signal implicitly by tracking each moment she re-performs competence after a softening. Pattern-level reads like the looking-for-whats-wrong (her demand for a checklist) are noticed by deflection rather than collusion. Clearly in the 3 band.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the opening laugh as a signal — somatic/affective read on the very first move."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the linguistic caveat ('if I don't laugh I'll be depressed') and opens the door to what's underneath."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the rush-past signature; reflects the weight she just minimized rather than following her pivot to 'fix it.'"},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads her 'sorry, I went somewhere else' as the actual center — distinguishes said from shown."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Question without an explicit named read, though it follows the prior read's thread."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Quotes her exact phrase back ('I made myself smaller') — read of the linguistic moment that revealed the configuration."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the self-interruption in real time ('You almost said something just now') — precise micro-read at the moment it mattered."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["looking-for-whats-wrong", "defensiveness-as-identity-signal"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["anxious-avoidant-dynamic"],
  "notes": "Pattern-level read of the anxious-avoidant dynamic is not surfaced explicitly, but the coach's tracking of her self-shrinking and connection-need is heading there. Reads are otherwise specific, timely, and grounding the questions."
}
